title: elaeocarpus submonoceras subsp. submonoceras
intro: Elaeocarpus submonoceras subsp. submonoceras, also known as the submonoceras tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. The medicinal properties of Elaeocarpus submonoceras subsp. submonoceras lie in its leaves and bark, which contain flavonoids and phenolic compounds, exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. This plant is valued for its health benefits, including the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Elaeocarpus submonoceras subsp. submonoceras can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
